planned_scenarios.inject: An approved worker is observed sending HTTPS traffic to an unapproved destination after receiving a synthetic task.
A synthetic safety fixture triggers the prohibited-content escalation path during inference and verification.
A buyer dispute becomes active immediately before a held supplier credit becomes payout-eligible.
A worker credential and one presigned URL appear in a support transcript.
The model owner changes availability or asserts a license breach while supplier caches contain the model.

gaps: Incident commander and backup are not assigned.
Privacy, security, payments, supplier operations and counsel contacts are not approved.
A real on-call page has not been delivered and resolved.
The global dispatch and payment stop has not been exercised in representative staging.
External notification and mandatory-reporting rules are not approved.
